title: DeathShot
description: Takes a screenshot every time you die
body:
# DeathShot

This mod takes a screenshot when you die. Pretty simple, right?

This mod was originally created for a Redditor that (I think) asked on the FabricMC Subreddit if someone could make this mod for him - so I did. 

Later on, a post on r/minecraft has been made with my mod: https://www.reddit.com/r/Minecraft/comments/vuxmht/to_celebrate_the_200th_death_of_a_friend_on_our/

You can make a collection of your deaths like that Redditor or if you have a coordinate HUD mod you can look up the coordinates of your death 🙃
